item.title: The Firt Post
item.description: The first post of this blog.

item.title: About
item.description: About the writer I’m akamayu, a computer science student in NTHU Taiwan. Even though this is a Japanese nickname, I’m a Taiwanese. I love exploring new stuff and curry rice 🍛. About this blog The main goal of is to leave some bread crumbs of my life, as a proof of existence. Three major directions of this blog: Life Techincal Notes Learning Notes I hope this time the habit of recording life would last. 2020 winter
